records.m_Talk_ENG: As always, I have comrades I can rely on fighting beside me. What is there to fear?

root.m_Talk_ENG: May the names of those who have fallen before you be with your determination!
root.m_Talk_DEU: May the names of those who have fallen before you be with your determination!
root.m_Talk_FRA: May the names of those who have fallen before you be with your determination!

root.m_Talk_ENG: May our names be with the determination of those who have fallen before us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: May our names be with the determination of those who have fallen before us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: May our names be with the determination of those who have fallen before us!
